description: Register a new runtime surface in the surface manifest. The surface becomes available to pnpm surfaces:start after applying.

command.description: Executable command to start the surface (e.g. node).

port.description: Port the surface listens on. Leave empty for services with no HTTP endpoint.

health_path.description: HTTP path for health checks (e.g. /health). Leave empty if not applicable.

notes: After applying, run `pnpm surfaces:reconcile` to start the newly registered surface.
